question: Based on the percentage labels in the chart, which statement is correct?

options.A: Quality has a higher value than Delivery.
options.B: Delivery and Support have the same value.
options.C: Support has the lowest value among all categories.
options.D: Price has a higher value than Design.

explanation: The labels show the actual values; dot positions are based on a different 'visual_height' scale, so the visual can suggest a different ranking than the data.
